pr.title: Non-record: Mamba3 Hybrid + GPTQ Long Context (1.1875 BPB)

output.summary: Mamba3 hybrid mixes eight SSM layers with two GQA attention layers, U-Net skips, and long-context training before EMA + Hessian GPTQ compression.
techniques: Mamba3 hybrid with 2 GQA attention layers and U-Net skip connections for long-context scaling
EMA smoothing before full Hessian GPTQ int6 compression with LZMA
Train seq_len=16384 to showcase Mamba linear-time context advantage
